description: Bifolium with multiple document entries, probably a fragment from a court register. Dated in fourth entry on 2v as Thursday 2 Kislev 5496 AM (1735 CE). Folio 1r: An incomplete document detailing a transaction in Ottoman fındıklı coinage between Yahuda b. Shemuʾel Fayrūz aka Shāmī and Shelomo ibn Qadīs Fayrūz. Folior 1v: Another incomplete document dealing with a transaction between Shelomo b. Yiṣḥaq Levi aka Darwīsh and Yeshuʿa b. Elishaʿ Rofe, that was previously recorded before a qadi court (אלמחכמה אלכבירה מחכמת קאצי אלעסכר) by one of their maternal uncles David b. Reʾuven aka Nqāsh. Folio 2r: Real estate case involving the orphans of Aharon Fayrūz. Folio 2v: Real estate transaction for a qodesh property involving Avraham b. David Levi aka Darwīsh and multiple members of the Rofe family. MCD.
description_he: ביפוליה עם כמה ערכי מסמכים, כנראה שבר מפנקס בית דין. תאריך בערך הרביעי: חמישי, ב' כסלו 5496 = 1735 לספירה. כולל עסקאות שונות בין חברי קהילה קראים וענייני נדל"ן.
